title: Thoughts of the Noob Episode 1 Act 3
display_title: Thoughts of the Noob Episode 1 Act 3
wikitext:
[]: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 3. Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:56 pm yeah... 1. Ew... period blood... ew.... (Shiro says it's the orange juice... just not orange) 2. Heeheeheee tampon plug ;pppppppp 3. EWWWWWW!!! He got covered in orange juice!! :( Poor Shinji. 4. LCL... what does that stand for?? 5. weeeeeeee!! rainbow tunnel!!!!!! 6. haha, The ending is so bad that you can't even understand what she's saying... ;p By the way. Now I shall compile things into Arcs... that way it makes more sense... to me... ;pppppppppp

[]: Post by Squiggy » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:58 pm It might be best to keep these reviews in one thread as to not cause confusion

[]: Re: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 3. Post by Shiro » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:59 pm birdyofthemoongoddess wrote: yeah... 1. Ew... period blood... ew.... (Shiro says it's the orange juice... just not orange) 2. Heeheeheee tampon plug ;pppppppp 3. EWWWWWW!!! He got covered in orange juice!! :( Poor Shinji. 4. LCL... what does that stand for?? 5. weeeeeeee!! rainbow tunnel!!!!!! 6. haha, The ending is so bad that you can't even understand what she's saying... ;p

[]: Post by Squiggy » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:02 pm FRY ME TO ZE MOON AND RET ME PREY AMONG ZE STARZ

[]: Re: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 3. Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:02 pm Shiro wrote: "Fly me to the moon, and let me play among the stars. Let me see what spring is like on Jupiter and Mars...."

[]: Re: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 3. Post by Squiggy » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:05 pm birdyofthemoongoddess wrote: Shiro wrote: "Fly me to the moon, and let me play among the stars. Let me see what spring is like on Jupiter and Mars...."

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:12 pm I've always liked that song, but the NGE version kinda sucks. But I will say that the song wasn't chosen at random. It's another "subtle little hint" regarding a lot of things in NGE (proof that Anno wasn't just making it all up as he went along). I'm too tired to reply to the rest, so I'll just post a a :? a :shock: and a :roll: to cover all my emotions.

[]: Post by Shiro » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:14 pm The moon is an object of HUGE amounts of symbolism and hinting, especially involving a certain blue haired, crimson eyed, robot-like teenage girl who's the object of many a fan's own personal SFAiBL experience.

[]: Re: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 3. Post by BrikHaus » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:18 pm birdyofthemoongoddess wrote: Shiro wrote: "Fly me to the moon, and let me play among the stars. Let me see what spring is like on Jupiter and Mars...."

[]: Re: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 3. Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:22 pm Mark Twain wrote: It is better to keep your mouth shut and appear stupid than to open it and remove all doubt.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:23 pm That's true. My musical elitism shines through once again.

[]: Post by Shiro » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:25 pm I don't like FMMTTM. I admit it. But it most definitely doesn't make me not like NGE. I just skip past it on the ending track. No biggie.

[]: Post by chee » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:26 pm @BrikHaus: Do you listen to Helmut Lachenmann? DO YOU? You're not allowed to be a musical elitist unless you like Helmut Lachenmann. Otherwise, you're just pretending. (Mind you, this is a half-joking comment that's coming from a guy who likes Lachenmann's music.)

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:28 pm BrikHaus wrote: That's true. My musical elitism shines through once again.

[]: Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:31 pm I just listen to whatever I damn well please. Doesn't usually matter to me. All that matters to me is if I like it or not, i'm not real deep on the criticism.

[]: Post by Squiggy » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:32 pm Everyone here is an elitist. The fact that we all like Eva proves this.

[]: Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:32 pm Squiggy wrote: Everyone here is an elitist. The fact that we all like Eva proves this.

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:35 pm Squiggy wrote: Everyone here is an elitist. The fact that we all like Eva proves this.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:36 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: Squiggy wrote: Everyone here is an elitist. The fact that we all like Eva proves this.

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:37 pm BrikHaus wrote: That's true. My musical elitism shines through once again.
